product: Enhanced autocomplete for complex data types in notebooks
tagline: Notebook autocomplete now supports enhanced suggestions for complex data types including structs, maps, and arrays in SQL cells.
what_it_does: Notebook autocomplete now supports enhanced suggestions for complex data types including structs, maps, and arrays in SQL cells. Additionally, when referencing common table expressions (CTEs) that use SELECT , autocomplete provides column recommendations based on the underlying table structure. The Databricks notebook and file editor provides keyboard shortcuts, code suggestions and autocomplete, variable inspection, and code folding to help you write and navigate code.
why_it_matters: Python type error highlighting: Type checking can improve code quality, readability, and maintainability in Python and PySpark projects.

capabilities.desc: On macOS, hold down the Cmd key and click in each location to add a cursor.

capabilities.title: On Windows, hold down the
capabilities.desc: On Windows, hold down the Ctrl key and click in each location to add a cursor.

capabilities.title: On macOS, press Option and
capabilities.desc: On macOS, press Option and drag to the lower right to capture one or more columns.

capabilities.title: On Windows, press Alt and
capabilities.desc: On Windows, press Alt and drag to the lower right to capture one or more columns.

key_takeaway: Notebook autocomplete now supports enhanced suggestions for complex data types including structs, maps, and arrays in SQL cells.
